seo.title: Pricing - AI Voice Agent Platform
seo.description: Transparent pricing for AI voice agents. Start free, scale as you grow. Enterprise plans available.

hero.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
hero.subtitle: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for trying out our platform

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations with custom needs

footer.note: All plans include 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Pricing is based on usage - minutes of conversation processed. Volume discounts are available for enterprise plans.
faq.a2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
faq.a3: We support 50+ languages including English, Spanish, Chinese, French, German, Japanese, and more.
faq.a4: Yes, all plans include a 14-day free trial with full access to features. No credit card required to start.
faq.q5: What kind of support is included?
faq.a5: Free plans include community support. Pro plans include priority email support. Enterprise plans include dedicated account managers and 24/7 phone support.
